name: comp7705_platform
description: This subdirectory contains the implementation of the platform for COMP7705 capstone project.

scripts.dev:psql-to-dev-db: docker run --rm -it -e PGPASSWORD=postgres postgres:17.6-alpine3.22 psql -h host.docker.internal -p 65432 -U postgres -d comp7705
scripts.dev:db-dump: docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=postgres -v ./_dbDumps:/dumps postgres:17.6-alpine3.22 sh -c "pg_dump -h host.docker.internal -p 65432 -U postgres -d comp7705 -F p --clean --if-exists --no-owner --no-acl -f /dumps/comp7705db-dump-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).sql"
scripts.dev:db-restore: docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=postgres -v ./_dbDumps:/dumps postgres:17.6-alpine3.22 sh -c "psql -h host.docker.internal -p 65432 -U postgres -d comp7705 -f /dumps/$1" _
scripts.dev:db-dump-bin: docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=postgres -v ./_dbDumps:/dumps postgres:17.6-alpine3.22 sh -c "pg_dump -h host.docker.internal -p 65432 -U postgres -d comp7705 -F c --no-owner --no-acl -f /dumps/comp7705db-dump-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).dump"
scripts.dev:db-restore-bin: docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=postgres -v ./_dbDumps:/dumps postgres:17.6-alpine3.22 sh -c "pg_restore -h host.docker.internal -p 65432 -U postgres -d comp7705 --clean --if-exists --no-owner --no-acl /dumps/$1" _
